MultiASR Subtitles

Cloud ASR + LLM translation pipeline for IINA

Pipeline

Speech recognition model used to transcribe the audio track.

MiMo ASR Translation

Required for both ASR and translation when MiMo is selected.
Default: https://token-plan-cn.xiaomimimo.com/v1 (Token Plan). Auth header is api-key.

Doubao ASR only

ASR 2.0 default: volc.seedasr.sauc.duration
Doubao does not provide a translation API. If you select Doubao for ASR, enable translation and choose MiMo or DeepSeek as the translation provider in the next section.

Translation LLM

Which LLM to use for the translation step (only used when "Translate subtitles" is enabled).

System

Used to extract the audio track from the video file.
